overall.description: First-person driving footage from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating rain-soaked neon-lit city streets at night before transitioning onto highways and tunnels. The clip showcases the game's distinctive cyberpunk aesthetic with heavy rain, reflective wet roads, and dense urban architecture illuminated by vibrant neon signage.

events.description: yellow sports car passes on the left side of the intersection
driving under an overpass with reduced overhead visibility

agents.ego_description: navigating through wet city streets, stopping at intersections and proceeding through traffic

pedestrian holding umbrella walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: rain-soaked reflective asphalt with puddles and wet surface effects
orange plastic construction barriers lining the right side of the street
illuminated neon signage on distant buildings with cyberpunk aesthetic
traffic signals suspended over the intersection showing red and green lights

segments.scene_description: Driving through rain-soaked urban streets at night, navigating intersections with construction barriers visible on the right. The wet asphalt reflects the neon lights from surrounding buildings as the vehicle passes under an overpass and shares the road with other vehicles including a distinctive yellow sports car.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with digital billboards and storefronts

events.description: passing large illuminated digital billboard casting bright light on the street
making a right turn at an intersection with construction barriers

agents.ego_description: cruising through commercial districts, making turns at intersections while observing pedestrians on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk near storefronts

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying advertisements on the side of a building
red and white striped construction barriers blocking off sidewalk sections
bright pink and blue neon signs for commercial establishments

segments.scene_description: Navigating through a commercial district with large digital billboards illuminating the wet streets. The vehicle makes a right turn at an intersection lined with red and white construction barriers, passing pedestrians on the sidewalks near neon-lit storefronts.

events.description: transitioning from city streets to elevated highway underpass
entering tunnel with artificial overhead lighting replacing ambient city light

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto the highway, following a truck and entering the tunnel system

notable_agents.action: large truck driving ahead in the same lane entering the tunnel

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure spanning across the road with support columns
bright orange metal guardrails lining the highway ramp edges
dark tunnel mouth with artificial lighting visible inside
tall concrete retaining walls with weathered textures

segments.scene_description: Accelerating onto an elevated highway system, passing under concrete overpasses with orange guardrails lining the ramp. The vehicle follows a truck toward and into a tunnel entrance, transitioning from open rainy streets to the sheltered underpass environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed highway tunnel with digital billboards

events.description: motorcycle with bright headlights approaches from the opposite direction
approaching tunnel exit with increasing brightness from the opening ahead

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the tunnel, passing under illuminated billboards and approaching the exit

notable_agents.action: motorcycle traveling in the opposite lane with headlights on

entered.detail: green painted concrete tunnel walls with horizontal panel lines
large digital screen mounted on the tunnel ceiling displaying advertisements
continuous rows of fluorescent lights running along the tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: Driving through an enclosed tunnel with distinctive green walls and linear overhead lighting. Digital billboards are mounted on the tunnel ceiling while the vehicle approaches the bright exit at the far end, passing a motorcycle traveling in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with city skyline view

events.description: exiting the tunnel into open elevated highway with visible city skyline
blue sports car overtakes on the left side

agents.ego_description: cruising on the elevated highway, enjoying the view of the neon-lit city skyline while navigating moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: blue sports car overtaking in the left lane at high speed

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage
overhead road signs with directional information suspended over the highway
concrete barrier separating the highway lanes from oncoming traffic

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel onto an open elevated highway with a panoramic view of the neon-lit cyberpunk city skyline. The road stretches ahead with multiple lanes while a blue sports car overtakes on the left, and the wet surface continues to reflect the myriad lights from the surrounding metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked urban center that transitions from dense city streets into a sheltered tunnel and finally onto an expansive elevated highway. It begins by navigating wet asphalt intersections reflected in neon light, passing construction barriers and other vehicles under a dark overpass. As the camera turns through a commercial district illuminated by massive digital billboards and glowing storefronts, the vehicle accelerates up a ramp with orange guardrails. The scene then shifts from the open rain into the enclosed environment of a tunnel characterized by green walls and linear overhead lighting, passing a motorcycle heading in the opposite direction. Finally, the camera emerges from the tunnel onto a wide highway, opening up to a panoramic view of the neon-lit cyberpunk skyline as a blue sports car speeds past.
